Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change
<!-- Please delete options that are not relevant. -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Translation / i18n update

## Pre-PR Checklist
<!-- Please check all that apply. -->
- [ ] My code follows the core design principles in `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I have run `cargo check` and it passes with zero warnings.
- [ ] I have run `cargo fmt --check` and `cargo clippy`.
- [ ] I have tested the changes locally (e.g., capture -> OCR -> translate pipeline).
- [ ] I have updated all 7 locale files in `src/i18n/` if I added user-facing text.
- [ ] I have added/updated relevant documentation.
